titleStmt.title: SII 28.315: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 315. (A.R. No. 469 of 1913.) KŪGAḶŪR, GOBICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: Madhyapurīśvara temple, north and east walls.

The writing of the inscription on the stone has been erased and damaged and some stones containing portions of the inscription are also missing. However as the text is a copy of an inscription found at Pāriyūr in the same taluk, and district (No. 185 of 1910) it has been possible to reconstruct the text.

It records a royal order exempting several temples from the payment of Voṭṭachchu as it had proved too burdensome. They were also freed from the obligation to pay the demands of officials and others. Mention is made of 600 achchu and another 100 achchu deposited, the latter being the amount diverted from dues payable to Toṇḍaimānār-patuvāra-achchu (?) payable on these said amount of achchus which was also exempted from payment.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīparakecari . svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakravatti konerimai koṇṭān vaṭakoṅkil naraiyaṉūr nāṭu Aṭikkiḻt taḷamāna [rāja]rājapuramum poṅkalūkkāṉāṭṭil kiraṉūruḷapaṭa Ūrkaḷum Alaṅkayam tanicciṭamum poṅkalūkkā ṉāṭum tenkarai nāṭum Aṇṭanāṭum talaiyūrnāṭum vaṭakarai maṇalū nāṭum A Some space on the stone between a and rai is left inscribed.raiya nāṭum kiḻaṅka nāṭum veṅkala nāṭum taṭṭaiyūr nāṭumiṭaippūḻuti nāṭum kāṅkaiya nāṭum 185 of 1910 which has an identical text has viracoḻa vaḷanāṭum paluppukkā nāṭum kuṟuppu nāṭum between kāṅkaiyanāṭum and vaṭaparicāranāṭum • āpparently the stone containing this missing portion has been lost.vaṭaparicāra nāṭum kāñcikkūṭal nāṭum pūntuṟai nā This portion which is damaged can be restated with the help of 185 of 1910 has the following text viḻ which reads kiḻppānāṭum after pūntuṟai nāṭum and vaṭakaraināṭumvaṭaka 185 of 1910 has innāṭukaḷil after vaṭakarai
śivabrāhmaṇak kāṇiyāḷarkkum tānattāṟkum tiruppāṇṭi koṭumuṭit tānattāṟkum tirukkaruvūrt tānattāṟkum tirumukūṭat tānattāṟkum tiruveñcamākkūṭat tānattāṟkum tirumurukanpūṇṭit tānattāṟkum Avināciyāḷuṭaiyār koyil tānattāṟkum taniyūrt tānattāṟkum nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu InṉāṭukaḷilAfter tiruk� and before koyil tirukkāppu 185 of 1910 has koyilkaḷukku pūjaiyum kaṟiyamutupaṭiyum naṟtiruk stone continuning this portion of the present inscription is lost.tirukkoyilkaḷoṭṭaccum muṇṭu munpu yiṟuttup potukaiyil pinpu tirukke koyil tirukkāppuk koṇṭuThis portion of the inscription which is erased can be restored as yiṟaiyāṟṟātu pokaiyil muṉṟāvatu mutal tirukkoyilkaḷiluḷḷa voṭṭa with the help 185 of 1910.
ccu Iḻantom kūttāṭu nāyanāṟkut tāṅkaḷiṭṭuk kuṭutta Amaippin paṭikku nam Olaiyiṭṭut taṇṭak kaṭavatallaāvākavum nāṭu piṭitta cāmantakaḷukku veṇṭukoḷ kuṭukkak kaṭavarkaḷallavākavum nam Olai EṭutThe stone containing the continuation of this line is missing. The missed portion can be restored with the help of 185 of 1910 tu varumavarkaḷukku nammeḻuttiṭṭuk kaḻaittu viṭum olaikku paṇam onṟum nam eḻutiṭṭamai colli viṭum olaikku ppaṇam Onṟum kuṭuttup povārkaḷākavum nam tūtaṟku vaḻivaravu coṟiṭak kaṭavarkaḷallavākavum Ivarkaḷukku kaiyyarici yerikka kaṭavarkaḷallavākavum Ippaṇamiraṇṭum kuṭuttup potumurkaḷ kuṭuttup potuvārkaḷākavum IppaṭikkuAfter ippaṭikku and before rkaḷ is the next line namakku iva is missing.
rkaḷ tanta Accu Aṟuṉūṟum toṇṭaimānāṟku kāriya vicattukkut tanta Accu nūṟumāka Accu Eḻuṉūṟum nam Olaippaṭi peṟṟāḷaṟkkuk kuṭukkaiyil Ivvaccukkup patuvār Accuttarak kaṭavarkaḷallaIn continuation before tribhuvanavira 185 of 1910 has vākavum ippaṭikku cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭi koḷvārkaḷākavum ippaṭikkup piṭipāṭāka nam olai kuṭuttom tribhunaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu munṟāvatu nāṭ pattu § Ivai toṇṭaimān Eḻuttu—ivai kurukularāyan Eḻuttu—ivai veṇāvuṭaiyān Eḻuttu— pa[ nmāheśvara rakṣai] . §
Digital edition of SII 28.315 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
